spell.name: Corrosive Muck
spell.text: You create two puddles of acidic slime that hinder the movement of anyone who walks through them. The area of each pool becomes greater difficult terrain. Each round that a creature starts its turn in one of the pools or enters a pool during a move action it's using, it takes 8d6 acid damage with a basic Reflex save. A creature that critically fails its saving throw also takes 1d6 persistent acid damage. As normal, if a Large or larger creature starts its turn in both pools, it takes the damage only once.

traits.name: Acid
traits.text: Effects with this trait deal acid damage. Creatures with this trait have a connection to magical acid.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.
